mapper.select: SELECT q.*, s.subject_name, t.real_name as teacher_name FROM question q LEFT JOIN subject s ON q.subject_id = s.subject_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON q.create_by = t.teacher_id WHERE q.question_id = #{questionId}

SELECT q.*, s.subject_name, t.real_name as teacher_name FROM question q LEFT JOIN subject s ON q.subject_id = s.subject_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON q.create_by = t.teacher_id ORDER BY q.create_time DESC

SELECT q.*, s.subject_name, t.real_name as teacher_name FROM question q LEFT JOIN subject s ON q.subject_id = s.subject_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON q.create_by = t.teacher_id WHERE q.subject_id = #{subjectId} ORDER BY q.create_time DESC

SELECT q.*, s.subject_name, t.real_name as teacher_name FROM question q LEFT JOIN subject s ON q.subject_id = s.subject_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON q.create_by = t.teacher_id WHERE q.create_by = #{createBy} ORDER BY q.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question (subject_id, question_type, question_content, options, correct_answer, score, difficulty, knowledge_point, create_by) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{questionType}, #{questionContent}, #{options}, #{correctAnswer}, #{score}, #{difficulty}, #{knowledgePoint}, #{createBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE question SET subject_id = #{subjectId}, question_type = #{questionType}, question_content = #{questionContent}, options = #{options}, correct_answer = #{correctAnswer}, score = #{score}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, knowledge_point = #{knowledgePoint} WHERE question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId}
